positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a whimsical fox peering over a stack of antique books, surrounded by stylized elements like constellations, smoking calligraphy pens, and floating floral motifs. The style should be inspired by elegant Nordic folk art and Japanese woodblock prints, using strong, flat silhouettes with clean lines and deep indigo, burnt orange, and cream color palette. The composition must be centered, highly detailed, and visually balanced, optimized for a seamless, print-friendly repeat pattern design. Studio lighting, graphic design quality, high contrast, negative space emphasized.
